summary: E-Way Bill module full E2E testing (backend + frontend). Backend: 25/25 pytest cases pass covering stats, records list + filters, PUT details, POST /run success + master_dispatch status sync to 'completed', skip rules (blank eway_bill + blank validity), failure path (ERR bill retries 3x, retry_count>=1, screenshot stored), retry-failed endpoint, run-status, POST /validation/test-run returns 11/11 all_ok including 'Master Dispatch sync' check (dispatch=403), settings shows missing TAFE_* env, live-mode rejected while validations incomplete, GET/PUT selectors (dispatch=403), xlsx export, logs, and regression on /api/master-dispatch, /api/dispatch, /api/packing/slips, /api/modules (eway-bill module.status=active). Frontend: /portal/modules/eway-bill loads for admin with both tabs (E-Way Entry + Selector Config & Validation), stats strip, TEST MODE badge, records table, log panel. Selector Config tab shows NOT READY banner, selectors JSON editor and 'Run TEST Validation' produces 11 green checks (screenshot verified all 11 items). Row edit dialog opens, save works, per-row Run button triggers automation and row transitions to Completed with 'Automation run finished' toast. Dispatch user: config tab hidden, Dashboard shows E-Way Bill Automation card as ACTIVE.
critical_code_review_comments: eway_routes.run_state is a module-level global dict — safe for single-worker uvicorn but would break with multi-worker deployment. Consider a DB-backed lock or reject at LB level.

process_batch never resets run_state on early HTTPException paths outside the try (e.g., process_batch is only ever called via BackgroundTasks so this is fine, but start_run raising 409/400 after run_state.update would be a bug — currently ordered correctly).

eway_routes.eway_run_all/retry-failed raise 400 'No records to process' via start_run when list is empty — UI could show friendlier toast (currently backend detail surfaces via toast which is acceptable).
seed_data_creation: Created 6 fresh master_dispatch records via POST /api/master-dispatch during tests (TEST_EWAY_*). All cleaned up in module-teardown fixture and inline cleanup calls. validation/test-run creates+deletes its own VAL-* samples.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E-Way Bill backend fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_eway.py — run with `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_eway.py -v -o addopts=''`. TEST mode is default. Backend uses a global run_state dict — only one automation run at a time (409 otherwise); tests wait for run-status.running=false before each run. process_batch in TEST mode takes ~1-3s per record. Sample already-created dispatch_no's from smoke test may persist (GEW-MD-00007, and TEST_EWAY_* if fixtures failed to cleanup mid-run).
